svg.title: MediStock AI — Full System Flow Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from ESP32 ultrasonic sensor through the web dashboard to dual automatic email routing for supplier and peer pharmacy.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor measure distance?')
sendPrompt('What does the ESP32 do in this system?')
sendPrompt('Show me the distance to bottle count mapping table')
sendPrompt('What JSON does the ESP32 serve at /status?')
sendPrompt('Show me the full JSON response from the ESP32')
sendPrompt('What are the four tabs in the MediStock AI web app?')
sendPrompt('How does the inventory quantity update in real time?')
sendPrompt('How does the system decide which email to send?')
sendPrompt('What does the supplier reorder email say?')
sendPrompt('Who receives the supplier reorder email?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the supplier receives the restock email?')
sendPrompt('What does the emergency P2P email to the nearby pharmacy say?')
sendPrompt('Which pharmacy receives the emergency P2P alert?')
sendPrompt('What does the nearby pharmacy do after receiving the emergency alert?')
sendPrompt('How are auto-sent orders recorded in the Orders tab?')
